\tzpentry{ID4211}{Transfer Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4211 introduces Transfer Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{T}_{\text{coupling}} = \int_{\mathcal{V}} \Psi_{\text{solar}} \cdot \nabla^2 h_{\mu\nu}^{\text{TT}} \, d^3x \end{equation}
